title: Driftscape: Void Demo
description: Pilot a momentum-driven ship through the cooled remains of dead star systems. Master a growing arsenal, take on 10+ unique epic bosses, and tackle two sectors (demo) your way. The world is seed-generated — build and share your own in the free level editor.

title: 电气战忍录-YOGENKYO Demo
description: Here’s your chance to become a young ninja of the Beasts Ninja Squad 4! Roam the stunning hand-drawn 2D bustling metropolis glowing with endless neon hues. Step forth fearlessly to battle vicious yokai gangs, and swear to defend peace and serenity across the city called YOGENKYO!

title: 城郊主理人从街角小店到区域价格卡特尔实现供应链托拉斯 DEMO
description: Suburban Manager is a hardcore supermarket sim based on Chinese business logic. Scout locations in a 3D sandbox and build a gridless store. Procure goods via App, manage logistics, and handle realistic payrolls including net salary and social security. Experience a pure retail journey.

title: Emotion Hunter Demo
description: A 2D hand-crafted anime-style side-scrolling melee action game created by a solo developer. Dive into the mysterious unconscious minds to hunt down negative emotion monsters! Master precise combat mechanics, challenge multiple difficulties, and find your perfect combat rhythm.

title: Crescent Creek Survival Demo
description: Crescent Creek: Survival Demo plunges you into a desolate farm, cut off from civilization and steeped in mystery. As you explore its winding corridors and ominous rooms, you’ll need to make critical choices, as each path could lead to salvation or peril.

title: Rashin Detective Chronicles CASE01： The Final Page Demo
Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok Demo
description: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok Demo Content The following three modes are playable in the demo version of Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok. 1. Story Mode 2. Quest Mode 3. Tutorial Mode

title: Magma Karta Demo
description: Magma Karta is a satisfying strategy card game with roguelite and gambling elements. The rules can switch at any turn, challenging you to adapt your builds and your playstyle.

title: Cotimero Demo
description: A new adventure awaits, so how can you hold back your steps? Choose the character you love, and claim the treasures guarded by fierce monsters. Every keystroke you make brings new hope and turning points to the world of Cotimero. Step into this world and write an eternal legend of adventure.

title: World Order: Global Power Demo
description: Rule any nation in one of the most detailed geopolitical simulations ever created. Balance economics, diplomacy, military strategy, public opinion, and global power as you guide your country through an ever-changing world shaped by your decisions.

title: Tetrabeasts Demo
description: Command a warband of monsters in Tetrabeasts,the explosive fusion of classic falling-block puzzles and tactical combat. Form deadly battle lines, clear rows to unleash devastating attacks on enemy castles, and survive relentless counterstrikes. Forge your army. Master the blocks. Conquer the realms.

title: Captain Corgi: Planetary Problem Solver Demo
ALONE: Mnemophobia Demo
description: Play the prologue of ALONE: Mnemophobia. Face "The Presence" in a disturbing interrogation, survive the darkness that drains your sanity, and solve macabre puzzles in this psychological horror demo with a gritty VHS aesthetic.

title: Eternal Decay Souls Demo
description: Explore a dark world filled with cursed creatures, solve ancient puzzles, and confront powerful bosses on a journey where each relic discovered reveals the secrets of eternal decay.

title: Mechanical Defense Line Demo
description: This is a tower defense, card-based roguelike game. Build and modify your turrets, equip gear to challenge levels and experience the story. Strengthen yourself via various functions, choose talents in battles to win. Get no less than 10 pieces of equipment in every fight.More content awaits in-game

title: Waste Runner: Critical Waste Demo
description: Step into the role of a city garbage collector and face the hidden dangers lurking in the streets. Viewed from a top-down, isometric perspective, the game challenges you to collect, transport, and safely dispose of waste across multiple urban neighbourhoods.

title: Neon Shifter Demo
description: An arcade racer infused with roguelite elements, fuelled by music, mayhem, and pure forward momentum.NEON SHIFTER pulls you into a high-speed, audio-driven road trip, where every move or crash can power your engine and build your advantage.
developer: Kittens in Timespace, Jelly Penguin Productions

title: Not My Son Demo
description: A psychological horror game where a stepfather is left alone with a disturbing child. Explore a quiet house, face growing nightmares, and piece together the truth behind the boy’s behavior.

title: Void Signal Demo
description: An immersive sci-fi space shooter where you pilot a ship through an anomalously expanding region of space. Analyze real-time scientific data, survive encounters with mysterious alien entities, make ethical decisions, and uncover hidden truths as the universe around you transforms.

title: Blades of Four Demo
description: A fast-paced fantasy action roguelike where 4 unique heroes battle through dangerous maps, unlock powerful items, and master devastating abilities with swords and bows

title: Potions & Passions: Therapist for Monsters Demo
description: Manage your spooky potion shop and meet monsters! Solve the tragicomic problems of vampires, werewolves, ifrits and trolls, or pit them against each other. Scavenge ingredients, craft volatile brews, and enjoy this chaotic management simulation!

title: Gridfire Demo
description: A top-down shooter with action packed PvP combat.  In the full game, engage in FFA or team based combat with game modes like capture the flag, control points, or team deathmatch.  In this demo, you can play CTF to to get a taste of Gridfire. If you enjoy it, please give the full game a try.

title: Mall Simulator Together Demo (Single Player)
description: Manage your own shopping mall, open new stores, organize deliveries, hire employees, and keep customers happy. This single-player demo offers a first look at the core mechanics of the full mall management experience.

title: DiceVenture Dungeon Demo
description: DiceVenture Dungeon is a roguelike dice-building dungeon crawler. Plan routes on a node map, roll and reroll dice in tactical combat, combine elements to trigger skills, and collect relics and traits. Dice challenges gate the best exploration rewards—every run builds differently.

title: A Good Deed On Harris Avenue Demo
Brazzante Demo
description: Featuring a unique doodle aesthetic, this world is entirely hand-drawn. Your goal? Use classic 'Rock, Paper, Scissors' mechanics to survive never-ending rounds.

title: The Lost Within Demo
description: A paranormal investigator enters an ancient forest shrouded in rumors of a mad woman. In this first-person horror, players explore dark thickets for clues and hidden evidence. Solving atmospheric puzzles reveals the truth as the boundary between sanity and madness collapses.

title: Not Quite Dead: Open World Survival Demo
description: Open world zombie survival Coop game with base building, looting, crafting, vehicles, and exploration.

title: Spellogger Demo
description: The first ever life-sim RPG where you play as a Wizard Lumberjack! Fell trees with your axe and magic. Explore a quiet world full of secrets, help villagers with their troubles, and steadily grow stronger as you gather resources and take down more trees.

title: Rebirth: Denied Protocol Demo
description: Trapped inside a failed resurrection experiment, a cop must survive grotesque creatures and uncover the truth behind a mad doctor’s obsession in this PS1-style survival horror with fixed cameras and tank controls.

title: Astral Archive Demo
description: Astral Archive is a 2D idle + active hybrid space shooter game where every run lasts just seconds but your progress lasts forever. Explore anomalous space zones, defeat enemies, and collect mysterious artifacts. Then turn your collection into a growing archive that attracts viewers and generates gold over time.

title: Life Core Demo
description: Life Core is a roguelite action game where you explore uncharted planets. Fight, eliminate your enemies, and when you fall, unleash the power of the Core in your new body. But remember… the system is always watching!

title: Roses In Concrete Demo
description: Inspired by a famous poem from a legendary deceased American rapper, Roses In Concrete is an exercise in distilling a literary work into gameplay mechanics that reinforce its core message.

title: Spheromania Demo
description: Bounce, blast, and outlast in Spheromania. A fast-paced arena shooter where drones duel with blasters, mines, and mid-air hops. Manage your energy, dodge the shrinking arena, and be the last sphere hovering. Solo mode or online multiplayer.

title: Let Rat Be Demo
description: Press countless keyboard keys simultaneously to help the little rat escape!

title: Astral Boost Demo
description: Astral Boost is a fast-paced endless runner where players build and maintain momentum by striking clouds and chaining boosts together. Set against vibrant skies and accompanied by an energetic soundtrack, the objective is to travel as high as possible and achieve the highest score you can.

title: DEATH PENALTY Demo
description: YOU ARE SENTENCED TO DEATH... Slither your way through an impenetrable fortress crawling with devils faster, stronger, and more cunning than any human. By sheer luck you've slipped through the cracks, but discovery means certain death. How long are you going to delay the inevitable?

title: Humble Abode & Strays Demo
description: A heartwarming idle game. You meet a group of stray cats in a shabby old room.Do nothing — just listen to the rain, rest with their purrs. Or pick up a brush and gently groom them. The fur balls you brush off are their thank-you gift to you.Use them to make this humble room a little warmer.

title: Expedition Idle Demo
description: An idle auto-battler ARPG where you create one-of-a-kind items with crafting materials you pick up from the ground, customize your adventurers with different abilities and stats, and strategize your way through difficult bosses, unique scenarios, and dynamic monsters!

title: Blightsilver Demo
description: Dark urban fantasy + hidden-grid strategy card game. Investigate liminal places. Duel on a secret 5×5 board where every face-down cards might be a lie. Nex Crowmont—a university nobody—is pulled into a conspiracy beneath ordinary life.

title: Future Fab Heroes Demo
description: Future Fab Hero, your mission begins now! Team up with your robot companion, CHIP-E, to complete hands-on technology and manufacturing simulations, earn rewards, unlock upgrades, and defend the Mars Innovation Zone from alien threats in a unique educational adventure.

title: LIMICORE Demo
description: LIMICORE is a dark and narratively driven experience containing uncovered mysteries. Traverse the world through various realities and solve engaging puzzles to discover the truth behind the organization's objectives.

title: Mystery of Prophecy Demo
description: Es un Metroidvania  pixel art basado en las profecías bíblicas, la salud y el parkour.

title: KYRO Demo
description: In this 30-45 minute demo, play as Aiden. Explore the Forest of Ka'a, solve puzzles to uncover ancient ruins, and use your slingshot and the KYRO system to conquer early bosses in this top-down, pixel art action-adventure prologue.

title: Best Streamer Demo
description: A ruthless streamer simulation where you'll do anything to reach the top. Grow legally with content or eliminate rivals with weapons. Manage survival needs, use illegal tactics to crush the competition, evade the police, and become the world's number one streamer

title: Sumo Fumble: Physics Party Demo
description: Sumo Fumble is a silly physics-based couch party game with procedurally self-balancing characters. Grab, heave, and throw your rivals into wild hazards, or pull their pants off for a laugh. Fumble, flail, and fall your way to victory in ever-changing arenas!

title: Fibula Demo
description: Embark on a dark fantasy action RPG adventure alone or with friends. Master combat and magic, explore dangerous dungeons, build a home, and create your own path through the world of Fibula.

title: SkullWar:ProvingGrounds Demo
description: A basic and comprehensive trial version is provided.

title: Grapixo Arte em Guerra Demo
description: Scratch in a 2.5D world that blends hip hop aesthetics with action/platforming, where urban art has come to life. Explore dynamic environments, face cleaning robots, and uncover secrets of this vibrant world as you reclaim your identity in this intense and colorful adventure.

title: .VXE Demo
description: You are the virus. Slide, dash, and delete hostile processes in a violent ballet of pixel art and display shattering action. Customize your circuit boards, summon hordes of digital familiars, and achieve ascension in this crunchy love letter to 90s shareware shooters and modern bullet heavens.

title: aurora Demo
description: 《Aurora》 is a sci-fi FPS game in which you and Ano will gradually explore your memories, using guns, dark powers, and wits to deal with threats or open the way forward, and finally find a reason to move forward.

title: 盲心：伪装的幻想 Demo
description: Blind Heart: Disguised Fantasy is an AVG game——At some point, my ordinary life stopped being ordinary… The doppelgängers I’d only read about in online horror stories had appeared in the real world. Before I could even process this, my lover, Lin Shiyu, knocked on my door.

title: Fascist Demo
description: As National Guard, stand defiant against relentless hordes. Unleash righteous fury. Old Glory waves eternal and America endures because YOU fight!

title: Foreign Rim Demo
description: A rich Turn-Based Strategy with deep mechanics, big armies and complex balance. Lead an expedition to explore the vast desert expanses. Play campaign, custom game, PvP, or create custom experiences with built-in scenarios and map editors!

title: Chicken Miner Demo
description: A single-player top-down mining management game. Capture chickens and mine minerals alongside them. Use the resources you gather to unlock more research, craft weapons, and build a more efficient mine. Grow and expand your mine together with your chickens!

title: Lost Exit Demo
description: A first-person psychological horror experience set in a forgotten shopping mall. Explore, investigate, and survive as reality twists into something far more sinister.

title: Becoming Pablo Demo
description: Rule the underworld in Becoming Pablo. A grand-strategy city-builder set in the gritty 70s-90s drug trade. Lead a cartel, conquer territories, manage operations, and outsmart your rivals. This isn't just about building an empire. It's about surviving it.

title: PICK A BOO Demo
description: PICK A BOOは磁力で家具をくっつけて運ぶオンライン協力アクションゲームです。

title: 夜班护士模拟器 Demo
description: Survive 30 days in this psychological horror nursing sim. Balance routine medical tasks and time management while evading terrifying anomalies in the dark wards. Manage your dropping sanity, earn your paycheck, and escape before becoming the hospital's next permanent patient.

title: Scratch your Luck Demo
description: Scratch, win, upgrade, survive.Buy scratch tickets, reveal symbols, and chase matching sets for bigger payouts. Rare symbols like Rainbow, Gold, White, and Black can multiply your winnings, but they are hard to find unless you invest in upgrades that improve your odds.Every run is a balance between risk and survival.

title: Gods' Gate Demo
description: Gods' Gate is a relentless isometric shooter where elite operatives plunge through ancient portals into procedurally generated mythological hellscapes. Survive escalating hordes, and extract before the Gate seals—leaving you trapped with the gods who want you dead. Solo or 4-player co-op.

title: Hey Tom! Demo
description: Stranded on an abandoned island hunted by the terrifying creature Tom, you must fight, scavenge, and manipulate your environment to survive

title: 无效化 Demo
description: Winnia is the only child in the sanatorium, spending her days lost in adventurous fantasies. Dr. Kai is a cold, meticulous physician who treats patients and diagnoses difficult cases. Innocent imagination and clinical rationality travel different tracks, yet quietly shape each other.

title: Cataclysm EscapeDemo
description: Scavenge for resources in a collapsing post-apocalyptic world, evade monsters, and successfully extract before the darkness consumes everything. Death means losing all the items you carried out.

title: Dungeons and Treasure 2 Demo
description: Dungeons and Treasure II is a voxel action roguelike for 1-4 players. Brave endless, scaling floors with 100+ items, buffs, and permanent unlocks. Explore procedural zones with unique bosses, secrets, and traps. Features full controller support and mid-run saves for desktop play.

title: KILL LOOP Demo
description: Ricochet! Destroy! Accelerate! This is a minimalist, high-speed action game. Dive into an endless loop of ricochets and destruction, and experience the pure thrill of the kill in a minimalist world!

title: Ultimate Sportsball Championship Demo
description: Ultimate Sportsball Championship (USC) is the mixed sportsball game your mom warned you about. You are not ready for this. Keep scrolling.

title: 黑帆王座·Galactic Loadout Demo
description: One more run won’t hurt… right? In Black Sail Throne: Galactic Loadout, chase insane synergies, uncover unpredictable upgrades, and push your warship beyond limits. Every choice snowballs into chaos—until you break the galaxy.

title: 灰度决策 Demo
description: After saving an old Taoist, a programmer discovers talisman crafting is just like coding. He starts a cyber talisman company, balancing profit and morality. Will you stay righteous or embrace the gray?

description: Decorate your own gingerbread cookies, and organize your scene. And share it with your friends. How about making my own scene this Christmas ?

title: Love  in Summer Demo
description: 毕业自驾游？不，是「心动修罗场」！ 《盛夏离与合》是现象级互动影像系列《完蛋！我被美女包围了！》IP的全新篇章。本次我们将填补“完蛋宇宙”时间线上的关键一块，带你回到那个承前启后、充满无限可能的毕业季，体验一段关于成长、抉择与命运交织的动人故事。 这段承前启后的夏日篇章，都会因你每一次的抉择，导向独一无二的盛夏结局。

title: Royal Signal : The Prince’s 5 Days Demo
description: Four princesses gather before the Crown Prince of the mightiest kingdom — you. Wield your royal gift — Telepathy — to peer into their hidden hearts. Behind every dazzling smile, each princess hides her own truth. Five days. See past the masks and choose the one to stand by your side.

title: snaze Demo
description: Snaze is a snake game. Eat the green dots and go to next level.

title: Neko Station Demo
description: Sit back and relax with Neko Station, a cozy 2D Pixel Art Desktop Idle Game! Manage your very own 'cat train,' decorating it with the perfect furniture to attract a diverse cast of feline customers. Pick them up at various stations and build friendships in this heartwarming adventure.

description: Run a quaint electronics repair shop in mid-2000s Tokyo. Grow your business by carefully restoring iconic video game consoles, cell phones, music players, and other nostalgic devices. Talk to customers, hear their stories, and see how your decisions impact both their lives and your shop.

title: BURNTCRUST Demo
description: Drive across randomly generated galaxies, deliver pizza, upgrade your ship, and plan your route to avoid hostiles. Or get drunk, gamble away your life savings, and crash full speed into an asteroid field. I won't judge.

title: Woke Up In a Dark Nightmare Demo
Whale Cleaner Demo
description: Take charge of a deep-sea wash station for filthy marine giants! Upgrade bizarre bio-industrial tools to scrub whales, dolphins, sharks and other mysterious beasts. Get them spotless before Mr. Claw docks your pay in this relaxing, atmospheric, and satisfying cleaning simulator. Find hidden secrets!

title: DesktopAnt Demo
description: Simulate feeding and transporting food for ants on the computer desktop. Re-create the experience of observing ants in reality. You can also use various props to play tricks on them. Usually, they forage around on the screen, constantly accompanying you and not interfering with your work.

title: Launch Them All Demo
description: A high-stakes turn-based missile duel where every shot matters. Spy, bluff, and deploy powerful tactical abilities to destroy enemy military assets while avoiding civilian casualties.

title: Watch Yo Plane Demo
description: Pilot a chaotic plane with a friend in this co-op rage adventure! Work together, survive brutal obstacles, conquer minigames, and see how far your teamwork can take you.

title: Lab 1995 Demo
description: A psychological narrative horror game where you explore an abandoned government lab while an AI imitating your father guides you.. Would you rather sit quiet OR discover the truth with Noah!!!

title: Bar Simulator Demo
description: This demo contains a limited portion of the full game experience. Additional content, features, bar types, and systems will be available in the full release.

title: Backrooms Protocol Demo
description: Backrooms Protocol Demo is a walk simulator designed to showcase the atmosphere and environments of the full game. It contains three different levels to explore, each featuring its own unique atmosphere.

title: Brazen Demo
description: Wield ancient elemental power in this first-person rogue-like and descend into a cursed labyrinth of escalating chaos, deadly spellcraft, and brutal ritual combat.

title: BREKEKEKEX Demo
description: Hunt frogs, clash with cultists, and survive close-range arena combat in this short, skill-driven swamp adventure.

title: Code-Black Demo
description: A First-Person Single-Player Zombie Survival game where you, "Rugir J.z" live through the initial events of a mass zombie outbreak, shoot, kill, upgrade, explore. Do you think you can survive, or possibly escape…

description: A real-time strategic football card game where you face your opponent head-on. Build tactics, boost your players with magic cards, and score 5 goals before your rival. Every decision matters—manage fatigue and limited cards to secure victory.

title: Avelins Journey Demo
description: Stranded on a mysterious alien world, you must climb ever higher through a surreal parkour of floating ruins, ancient structures, and magical forces. Every fall costs time. Every move requires skill. How fast can you reach the top?

title: Baramon: Gotta Fu*k 'em All Demo
description: Baramon is a monster-catcher game mix with dating sim elements and a lewd flavor. Catch your Baramon, extract milk from them, and inject it into another one for a unique combination of skills.

title: 無人島哪有這麼爽 Demo
Truck-kun is Supporting Me from Another World?! Demo
Broom Racer Demo
description: Broom Racer is a first person, multiplayer party racing game on flying brooms. Race your friends or players world wide through mountains, tight tunnels, forests and more. Fly risky maneuvers to gain a speed boost but don't fall of your broom!

title: A Hard Game About Reaching Valhalla Demo
description: Swing your axe, master momentum and overcome impossible obstacles on your journey to Valhalla, alone or with your friends

title: Nomad Drive Demo
description: Repair your rundown RV and hit the road solo or in 1–4 player co-op through a procedurally generated post-apocalyptic world. Gather resources, customize your RV, and survive as long as you can.

title: Melted Time Demo
description: Candle, your path is full of puzzles. Can you handle it? Hurry, your time is already melting away.

title: LarsGadiel Demo
description: LarsGadiel is the prequel to Xenon Valkyrie, a game originally created for Nintendo's 8-bit console that was never released (at least for now), but is now coming to Steam. It's a classic Metroidvania, featuring the original maps and design from that era.

title: Echoes of Aincrad DEMO Version
description: Step into Aincrad, a world of beauty and danger where every battle could be your last. This Demo version allows you to play the Beta Test chapter. Save data from the demo can be carried over to the full version.

title: All Hallows Demo
description: Survive a shifting, brutalist nightmare. In this high-fidelity psychological horror demo, manage a systemic economy of decay as you navigate the Ithris Cemetery. Explore, adapt, and confront an evolving threat tailored to your personal fear profile. Can you anchor your reality?

title: Cave Clicker Demo
description: Mine rocks to collect rare ores to become the richest Mole alive, and looking good while doing it too!

title: Bato Battō - Demo
description: Bato Battō is an online multiplayer 3D platform-fighter. Each weapon has a unique move list. Fight in every direction with weighted & athletic movement, and multi-chain combos using stylized physics. Demo modes - Free for all & Team slayer. Release to include CTF, King of the Hill, Race & more

title: Order of the Sinking Star Demo
description: From director Jonathan Blow (Braid, The Witness), Order of the Sinking Star is a puzzle adventure set in a realm of magic and enigma. Solve interconnected, hand-crafted puzzles, discover unique playable heroes, master evolving gameplay mechanics, and decipher a grand mystery. Play the demo today!

title: Drained Creatures Demo
description: Drained Creatures is a multiplayer 3D arena brawler for up to 8 players locally, playable using gamepads only.

title: Taxi Simulator (Demo)
description: Jump into the Taxi Simulator Demo! Drive a classic yellow cab through a vibrant city district. Complete your first missions, refuel, clean up your ride, and avoid traffic tickets. Experience the shady, wild life of a streetwise cabby. Your shift starts now!

title: Estancia Protocol Zero Demo
description: A first-person survival horror set in Neuquén, Argentine Patagonia. Venture into a remote estate in Cerro Ocaso to search for your missing partner. Face hordes of the undead, manage your resources, and solve classic puzzles to survive the nightmare.

title: MOLOKAUST Demo
description: Venture into a cursed town in this ruthless first-person survival horror game. With a hyper-realistic atmosphere and extreme survival mechanics, you'll need to ration your inventory and confront your worst nightmares to save your wife and daughter.

title: Ghostslayers Demo
description: Ghostslayers is a wave-based top-down coop shooter where you slay the ghosts with magic and couple thousands of bullets... Or punches, or slashes, or explosions. Use the varied weaponry, spell cards and abilities, combine them together and obliterate absolutely everything.

description: Play a focused slice of CyberSushi: a fast arcade roguelite where tiny sushi heroes race through collapsing dimensions, chain streaks, fill Sushi Surge, choose run-bending Sushi Hacks, and chase one more impossible run.

title: Deepscape Inc. Demo
description: A 2 to 4 player co-op horror game. You wake up marked with an ID number you can't see on your own back. Only your fellow inmates can read it. Find each other, share your numbers, reach your validation rooms, and get out before whatever roams the halls finds you first.

title: Loot List: Thief Simulator — DEMO
description: Rise from pauper to master thief - grab the loot list and get to work, whether it’s a roadside diner or a federal vault: slip past security and make fools of everyone, or unleash chaos and blow the place apart. Fence the haul to upgrade the hideout, gear up, and build your criminal empire.

title: Beerhouse Simulator Demo
description: Brew beer your own way! First-person homebrewing simulator where every batch can go brilliantly wrong or surprisingly right — and clients might just notice the difference, or not. Brew, experiment or cause total beery mayhem.

title: bang shoot demo.
description: A fast-paced arena shooter where you wield two weapons at once across unique battlegrounds. Each round is different: new map, teams, weapons, and modifiers.

title: FLESHBREAK Demo
description: A story-driven survival visual novel inspired by SCP-610. Face a flesh-spreading outbreak, make brutal moral choices, protect the people you can’t let go of, and uncover the terrifying truth behind the disease.

title: A.V.E.N.A Demo
description: Pilot disposable combat drones through the Primal Portal in a sci-fi action roguelike. Customize your drone, fight through various missions, recover research data and alien technology to enhance your drone setup for the next session.

title: Alchemist's Arcana Demo
description: Madness and reason,illusion and reality,ignorance and progress.These forces entwine upon a land long shrouded in superstition.In this puzzle-driven tale,cling to your reverence for science,guard your humanity,for when the last stars vanish from the sky,darkness and despair will reclaim their rule.

title: Football Pitch And Arcade Simulator Demo
Kick Demo
description: Kick is a nostalgic tale of making your way to school, all the while honing your soccer skills throughout challenging levels packed with unique challenges. Do you have what it takes to Kick it?

title: Please, Spin Demo
description: The wheel of fate roguelike where you spin for your life. Customize your wheel, discover game-breaking relics, survive twisted side events, and outsmart rigged bosses to beat the lunatic host and escape the broadcast!

title: DarkMytholoqy:Lucy Demo
description: In a deserted city from the Middle Ages, many mutated zombies appeared. The army had previously developed poisonous gas here. The higher-ups were worried that the zombies would invade the surrounding cities, so they sent Lucy to investigate the situation

title: Clawless Coin Demo
description: Run your own claw machine empire, collect trophy plushies, unlock upgrades, and prestige for massive profits in this cozy arcade idler.

title: KAON : Fragmented Core Demo
description: KAON: Fragmented Core is a 2D action-platformer with a metroidvania feel. You play as Kaon, an android awakened in a world where no one lives anymore, neither humans nor animals. Mostly what’s left is plants, ruins, and robots, a good chunk of them turned hostile

title: The Refuge Demo
description: Serve the A.R.C organization. Infiltrate infested zones, complete contracts, and extract with your resources. Upgrade your facilities and complete quests to unlock new services. An intense PvE extraction where the difficulty increases with your ambitions.

title: LampMan! Demo
description: LampMan! is a 2d action-platformer featuring three playable characters you can switch between at any time. Master their abilities, conquer vibrant levels, and restore light to LampWorld!

title: The Disappearance of Emily Crowe Demo
description: A first-person psychological horror game where you explore, hide, and evade entities with unique behaviors while using your real phone to detect and exorcise nearby threats, as you uncover what happened to your missing sister.

title: Birds of War Demo
description: You are a bird. You have a nest. Other birds want your eggs. Birds of War is a team-based aerial PvP game. Raid nests, steal eggs, fight beak-to-beak in fast, chaotic matches built around flight and combat. Your mic is always hot. Your enemies can hear you. Plan accordingly.

title: The Crimson Contract Demo
description: Every contract pays. Some cost what’s left of your humanity.

title: Welcome Demon Demo
description: You killed the last Warden. Now his chair is yours. For 666 hours, judge demons, expose their lies, read the Warden’s book, and place each soul in the right dungeon before Chaos consumes the prison.

title: 蒙古之岚 剧本1：崇正学堂篇 Demo
description: A historical visual novel set in early-20th-century Inner Mongolia. Make choices for Saran, a girl placed in the real Chongzheng Academy, and branch her story toward five true endings. Featuring native vertical Mongolian script rendering and reimagined period music.

description: A horror co-op extraction builder set in a scorched wasteland where everything burns. Descend with your friends into shifting ruins, rip out furniture, and scavenge for loot before the Corrupted close in. Make it back alive, then rebuild the Outpost to better your chances for the next run.

title: Cat Mail Co. Demo
description: Run a cozy cat post office. Sort and deliver parcels from the daily boat, organizing everything your way. At night, the moon reveals hidden truths about packages. Clear a strange backlog, help locals, and unlock new abilities and destinations.

title: Life Sim : Shape your city (DEMO)
description: Build the city. Shape the society. Live the life. Wield absolute power over economy, trade, and demographics in this high-fidelity city builder sandbox demo. Prepare the ultimate living metropolis before stepping down to the pavement as a simulated citizen in Life Sim!

title: Pro Soccer Manager 27 Demo
description: Become the manager of a football team and take full control of your club. Manage scouting, training, facilities, and squad development. Choose your philosophy: focus on coaching and tactics, or invest in developing the next generation of stars. Success depends on your decisions.

title: Object Impermanence Demo
description: A first person puzzle game where your vision defines reality, and only the things you can see exist. Learn and master the strange behaviours of objects outside your vision. Traverse the ancient structures of a world forgotten by the universe.

title: Wreck Runners Demo
description: Try the demo of physics-based co-op extraction game for crews of 2-4 players. Venture into the twisted Bermuda Triangle aboard the ORCA, a hybrid utility craft that can fly, drive and dive. Gather loot, buy new equipment, and unlock cosmetics across chaotic runs.

title: After End Demo
description: This is the playable demo for After End, a First Person ARPG currently in development.

title: The Fish Corner Demo
description: In The Fish Corner, you run your own cozy pet fish shop and collect many unique breeds.Decorate your rooms and storefront, greet customers, and negotiate fair prices. Choose which fish you want to sell and which ones you want to keep for yourself.

title: Invaders Loop Demo
description: In Invaders Loop, which combines classic arcade spirit with roguelite mechanics, survive relentless waves of enemies raining down from the depths of space, dodge bullets, equip yourself with various items from the market, and defeat epic bosses.

title: Mythic Kart Maker Demo
description: Mythic Kart Maker is part level maker, part fantasy kart racer. Vehicular combat, whimsical characters, & a vibrant 64-bit pre-rendered art style come together to create a chaotic, creative playground where you build the race - and then survive it.

title: 4th & Goal Demo
description: 4th & Goal combines roguelite deckbuilding with American football. Make cuts, additions, and upgrades to your team through the Gauntlet Challenge!

title: Nytherra Demo
description: A cozy 2D adventure where you explore, gather resources, turn them into profit, craft, and battle enemies to save a fading world before time runs out.

title: Smokey Mike Demo
description: In stand-up, talent isn't always enough. In this point and click adventure you have to improvise, survive and fail with style until you craft the five minutes that could change everything.

title: WARD: Descent Demo
description: WARD: Descent is a 2D dungeon-crawler roguelike where you pilot an armored combat suit. Explore an overrun research laboratory, manage your suit's upgrades, and complete sequences to destroy anomalies. Descend to the bottom, pilot, and complete your mission! This demo features the first 2 floors!

title: KOTAMON: My Sis Found A Super-Rare Card In Her Cereal Box, So I Became A Garbage Man To Find The Entire Collection And Earn $1,000,000 Demo
Decline Demo
description: Welcome to your new night shift inside an abandoned underground drainage facility, you should handle the power problems nobody else wants to deal with. Your main task is simple: monitor the security cameras, manage your limited electricity, and survive until dawn. But don't HIDE, they see you.

title: Taddius and the Forbidden Bog Demo
description: In "Taddius and the Forbidden Bog", manage an inn for lost travellers, restore a ravaged bog, and find purpose in the most unexpected of places.

title: Big Golden Rock Demo
description: Big Golden Rock is a pixel incremental clicker about a huge golden rock. Gather resources, hire shooters and archers, build towers, launch rockets, summon UFOs, and unlock increasingly powerful upgrades.

title: Mass Edge - Gravity Ball Demo
description: Mass Edge Demo is a vibrant 3D puzzle-platformer inspired by the cult 90s classic Game, bringing back that unforgettable feeling of rolling, balancing, and thinking your way through impossible spaces.

title: Feed the Cat: Gravity Puzzle Demo
description: Move platforms, manipulate gravity, and solve relaxing physics puzzles to guide the food safely into the hungry cat's bowl. A cute, logic-based casual game where your main goal is simple: make sure the feline gets its treat!

title: Arcana, Gas & Waterworks Inc. Demo
description: The full set of game features through the first six levels of your fantasy utility career.

title: Travelling Home: Ever After Demo
description: Own a moving castle! A full-screen ambient idle game with built-in productivity tools. Travel a charming world in your train house. The perfect companion for study, work, creation, and sleep.

title: Streets of Miami VR Demo
description: Streets of Miami VR is a gritty 1980s crime-action VR game where you fight, drive, spray paint, shoot, hustle for money, and survive the streets of Miami in a open world sand box experience built for physical VR gameplay.

title: Dice Tech Dominion - Enter the Shadow Circuit Demo
description: Build your dice deck, shape the dungeon board, and command monsters in a 3D tactical dice battler.

title: Train Set Code Demo
description: Build a train set layout where everything runs on its own. Automate points and signals to direct the trains and keep them moving. Get creative and design a huge network that carries a fleet of trains.

title: Hellbridge Demo
description: Defend the last bridge to the living world in a relentless siege from Hell. Survive escalating waves, draft powerful spells, grow stronger with every run, and enter cursed gates to stop the invasion at its source.

title: Cubic Spree Demo
description: Cubic Spree is a fast-paced 2D shooter - Play locally and online with your friends, choose your weapons, and blast your way to victory with colorful chaos!

title: Iris Grid Demo
description: Match by color or value. Chain combos. Craft builds. Outsmart 40+ levels that twist the rules. A roguelite tile-matching strategy game where every match feeds a scoring engine you design. 120+ cores, items, and patches. No two runs play the same.

title: SCP: Antimemetics Division Demo
description: No, it's not your first day. The Amnestics have kicked in, and Site-48 has locked down. Scavenge restricted gear, gain clearance to forgotten levels, and bend reality to escape lethal SCP anomalies. Tactile survival horror where remembering too much will get you annihilated.

title: BLORBIT Demo
description: Flip gravity to climb. BLORBIT is a cute-creature vertical platformer climbing 6 biomes from meadow to deep space. Flip platforms only hold when gravity matches. Go Endless, chase Dailies, relax in Zen, or race 10 players online. How high can you climb?

title: Arc Salvo Demo
description: Arc Salvo is a fast-paced online turn-based artillery game featuring explosive team battles, a growing arsenal, and deep character customization.

title: The Murder Of Yesterday Demo
description: A psychological horror crime experience featuring Story mode and Anomaly mode. Where time is your only weapon.. travel back through fractured moments to stop a brutal crime before it happens uncover the truth, alter the outcome, and face the consequences of changing fate in a haunting reality.

title: SYSTEM_REBOOT Demo
description: Dive into the heart of a compromised mainframe in this psychological, meta-narrative bullet heaven. You are the Icarus Protocol, an advanced system cleaner tasked with purging catastrophic malware. But as the glitches intensify you'll soon realize that this is far more than just a simple simulation.

title: SHADE WALKERS Demo
description: A 2v2v2 horror escape royale set in a haunted school. Team up with your partner, gather ritual dolls, use items, avoid deadly entities, and outplay rival duos. Only one team can escape.

title: Gems are Mine, Slashes are Yours: Blood & Blessing Demo
description: A fast-paced 2D survival action roguelike where you bleed to fight, and she complains while healing. Consume your HP to smash through endless hordes, survive extreme resource swaps with a greedy AI cleric, and work a second job hunting bounties to pay for your skills!

title: 黯渊崛起 Demo
description: 这是一款RPG刷宝冒险游戏，内容丰富，多职业多次转职和觉醒成长、门派势力选择、宠物进化培养、宝石镶嵌——构建专属的深渊冒险。 几百种装备和独特道具自由搭配自由冒险，数百种技能机制各异玩法丰富，大量新的冒险地图等你来探索。

title: Agrocracy Demo
description: A farming management game focused on planning and numbers. This is not a farming sim - no driving, animals, or role-playing. Manage weather, labor, capital, and time on a large isometric map.

title: The Quiet After Demo
description: You play Ava, a would-be adventurer whose guild registration is only the first step into something far more dangerous, on the road ahead and beneath her own skin. A psychological, choice-driven visual novel where every decision shapes who she becomes.

title: Death's Life 2 Demo
description: In this demo you can try a physics-based puzzle game where you play as Death, creating “accidental” deaths through chain reactions. Solve scenarios in multiple ways or survive and escape from deadly trap-filled environments.

title: Scrap Isle Demo
description: Scrap-Isle is a short, incremental game where you sell trash to make loads of money, you earn levels and increase your trash production while fighting off enemies that want to take your trash from you, you can even hatch a variety of helpers to automate your money production!

title: TimelineTown-タイムラインタウン Demo
description: Invite friends to TimelineTown and grow your SNS together! Enjoy a relaxing sandbox-style simulation where numbers keep rising and new features unlock as your SNS levels up. Create trends, chat, and make posts go viral!

title: Level Up, Tiny King! Demo
description: Level Up, Tiny King! is a solo survivors-like auto-shooter platformer. After being kidnapped and thrown into the dungeons, you must fight your way upward. Survive relentless waves of cute enemies while climbing. Grow stronger, recruit magical buddies, and reclaim your throne.

title: Miniature LAND -Four Seasons- Demo
description: An escape room adventure set in a handcrafted miniature world. Can you find your way back home?

title: Summer Coming (夏天来了)  Demo
description: Summer Coming is a heartwarming pixel-story game that transports you back to university days, where you’ll experience a summer filled with friendship, budding romance, and personal growth. Through free exploration, interactive choices, and playful mini-games, you can write your own chapter of youth.

title: RETRIEVAL Demo
description: RETRIEVAL is a first-person psychological horror game where you explore a looping house, collect scattered memory fragments, and search extracted keywords in an old computer terminal to uncover a tragic truth.

title: Medieval Tavern Simulator Demo
description: Transform a run down tavern into the region's most popular gathering spot. Serve beer, manage your customers, and expand your business. Increase your profits while protecting your reputation, because every night brings new opportunities, surprises, and a touch of chaos to your doorstep.

title: BIBI DICE Demo
description: Roll eight dice, build scoring hands, stack multipliers, collect relics, and defeat enemies in a compact desktop portrait dice-building roguelite.

title: ReactFuse: Stolen Minds - Tech Demo
description: Originally developed to push the limits of a custom FPS engine, This is a playable technology showcase demonstrating real-time simulation of thousands of NPCs, a projectile-based ballistic system, and a dynamic sound system.

title: Van Tich Legends Demo
description: VẠN TÍCH LEGENDS DEMO IS OFFICIALLY OUT ON STEAM!Are you ready to rewrite Vietnamese fairy tales in the most intense and epic way possible? The official Demo of Vạn Tích Legends is now available on Steam (PC)! Step onto the fiery battlefield of mythical gods!What’s waiting for you in this Demo?

title: Lootborne Demo
description: Lootborne is a dark fantasy desktop autobattler. Build your character, loot gear, push through PvE stages, and challenge other players in async PvP duels while battle rages at the edge of your screen.

title: Mr. Nice Guy Demo
description: Play as the Final Girl and explore a haunted children's hospital in this PSX-style fixed-camera survival horror inspired by "Fatal Frame" and "Resident Evil". Hunt anomalies through a CCTV camera loop similar to "I'm on Observation Duty". Unravel an unsettling mystery, and escape a glitching entity.

title: 匣中少女的第二次末日 Demo
description: Infinite flow × mild horror × ensemble visual novel. Join this doomsday carnival together with the young girls~

title: Beyond Hatred Demo
description: Beyond Hatred (Demo) is a 2D ARPG where you follow Daran on his quest to rescue Alexia. Fight enemies, overcome obstacles, and gear up to survive in a hostile world filled with danger and challenges at every step.

title: Cursor Kingdom Demo
description: Record your actions and turn them into workers. Build an automated kingdom of cursor clones, optimize production chains, and survive enemy raids.

title: Tomo Cafe Demo
description: Tomo Cafe is a cozy, narrative-driven productivity game set in a relaxing study cafe. Set your real-life to-do list, work alongside energetic and chaotic focus buddies, and unlock heartfelt stories as you check off your goals.

title: Pinball Millionaire Demo
description: Pinball Millionaire is a physics-based marble simulation game. Let marbles bounce repeatedly off various objects to keep boosting your score, and finally guide them into the highest-multiplier scoring zone. Use the rewards you earn to upgrade and enhance the map continuously.

title: Neko Miko Kaibyo Shioki no Emaki Demo
description: "Neko Miko Kaibyo Shioki no Emaki" is an arcade-style action game where both allies and enemies are cats. Control the cat shrine maiden and her cat companions with the joystick, and run through the stages while defending against the fierce attacks of the monstrous cats with your feline companions.
